---
title: "Notes"
description: "All notes and articles."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, reading-time]
---

Every note in this folder appears below automatically, newest first. To add a
new one, copy `first-note.qmd`, give it a new file name, and change the title
and words inside. It will show up here the next time the site is rendered.
